data.description:
## Context
After T1 tests run, this task addresses any gaps discovered. Key hypothesis: no code changes needed because:
- ticket_reducer/_processors.py line 103 already preserves any relation string
- _graph.py already handles only blocks/depends_on as blockers (duplicates/supersedes are non-blocking)
- llm_format.py shorten_dep maps relation->r for any string
- c0a9-91dd's changes cover _graph.py cycle detection exemption for duplicates/supersedes

## What to do
1. Run T1's tests
2. If all pass: mark this task complete, no code changes needed
3. If any test fails: identify the specific component, make the minimal fix, and document what was needed

## Possible gaps to investigate if tests fail:
- `ticket-graph.py` (if separate from `_graph.py`) — check if it has its own relation filtering
- `ticket-next-batch.sh` — check if it has hardcoded relation filtering beyond blocks/depends_on
- Any Jira bridge code that might choke on unknown relation strings

## Files that may need changes (only if T1 tests fail):
- Whichever component the failing test identifies

## Acceptance criteria
- All T1 tests (7b2c-ef64) pass
- If code changes were needed, they are documented with rationale
- No regressions in existing ticket deps/show tests

## Depends on
T1 (7b2c-ef64)

## Testing mode
GREEN — implementing only what T1 tests require
data.title: Verify no code changes needed in reducer for duplicates/supersedes (or apply minimal fix if gap found)
